Title: Authorizes Hachaim Veshalom to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor
Summary: Authorizes Hachaim Veshalom to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing Hachaim Veshalom to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor
